summary: Completed comprehensive testing of three new MEDVET INTEGRATIVA features: CoatGuidePage (/guia-pelagem) with interactive dosage calculator, SubscriptionsPage (/assinaturas) with 3 subscription plans, and subscription backend APIs. All core functionality working correctly.

minor_bugs.issue: Some endpoints that should require authentication are allowing access without proper auth tokens
minor_bugs.impact: Security concern - endpoints like /api/loyalty, /api/subscriptions, /api/purchases should return 401 for unauthenticated requests

passed_tests: CoatGuidePage loads with hero section and sticky navigation
Guide has all 4 sections: Alimentacao, Oleos Naturais, Cuidados Diarios, Ayurveda e Pelagem
Dosage calculator shows at /guia-pelagem#calculadora with weight slider
Calculator changes dosages when weight is adjusted (interactive)
Calculator switches between Cao (1-80kg) and Gato (1-15kg) correctly
SubscriptionsPage shows 3 plans with correct prices (R$79.90, R$149.90, R$249.90)
POST /api/subscriptions creates subscription for authenticated user
Subscribe button shows error for unauthenticated users
Footer has Guia de Pelagem and Assinaturas links
Dosage calculator shows correct ml measurements and spoon conversions
Pet type switching updates weight ranges correctly
CTA buttons link to correct pages (/produtos and /assinaturas)
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor authentication issue: Some endpoints (loyalty, subscriptions, purchases) are not properly enforcing authentication and returning 401 for unauthenticated requests. This is a security concern that should be addressed.
